package.name: slamko_fusion
package.description: slamko Tier-2 fusion: GtsamLocalSmoother — a GTSAM IncrementalFixedLagSmoother (iSAM2 + marginalization) over T_WB/vel/bias/landmark nodes fusing CombinedImuFactor + GenericStereoFactor. Implements slamko_core::LocalSmoother. Apache-2.0 (GTSAM is BSD-3).
